title: 3 Calorie Myths Killing Your Gains
setting: Dark dramatic studio with moody directional lighting, deep plum background, tension-building cinematic color grading, consistent camera distance and height, red and violet accent lights

scenes.prompt: Dramatic shot of scale with question marks floating around it, dark moody background with red warning glow, cinematic tension lighting, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Three calorie myths that are killing your gains right now.

scenes.prompt: Visual of person eating tiny salad looking miserable, dark background with cold blue lighting, dramatic portrait, contrasted with overlay text, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Myth one: eating less always means losing more. Wrong. Drop too low and your metabolism crashes. You need a smart deficit, not starvation.

scenes.prompt: Clock showing midnight with food plate crossed out, dark dramatic background, violet and coral lighting, cinematic composition, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Myth two: no carbs after six pm. Total bro science. Your body doesn't have a carb curfew. Total daily intake matters, not timing.

scenes.prompt: Person staring at calorie counting app showing 1800 calories with confused expression, dark moody lighting, violet haze, questioning look, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Myth three: a calorie is a calorie. Not exactly. 200 calories of chicken builds muscle. 200 calories of candy doesn't. Macros matter.

scenes.prompt: Person confidently preparing balanced meal with dark premium app showing macro tracking in background, warm coral lighting, empowered lifestyle, 9:16 vertical
scenes.text: Track smart. Send to a friend.
scenes.voiceover: Stop believing myths. Start tracking smart with Cals2Gains. Send this to someone who needs it.
